about.label: About
about.title: Blending product logic with clean execution.
about.description: I’m a Product Designer & Product Manager focused on turning complex products into clear, usable, and business-aligned experiences. I don’t just design screens — I shape systems that teams can build, users can understand, and businesses can grow with.

principles.title: Product thinking
principles.text: I connect user problems, business goals, and technical constraints before jumping into screens.

principles.title: UX execution
principles.text: I turn complex flows into clear interfaces, strong hierarchy, and practical design systems.

principles.title: Team leadership
principles.text: I work closely with developers and stakeholders to move ideas from discovery to delivery.
